heading: 1.6 Basic Math Operations
text:
R can used calculator using standard arithmetic operators: +
- +: addition
- -: subtraction
- *: multiplication
- /: division
- ^: powerR like calculator operators follow standard order operations. examples:

heading: 1.7 Functions
text: R extensive list existing functions can used. function specific name followed set parentheses. Using function calls specific collection code executed. Generally code executed needs specific arguments inputs run correctly user provides values parentheses follow function name.Functions can used basic calculations, complex procedures, many things . can also write functions.R case-sensitive, functions want use must typed exactly defined.common functions listed :
code:
log(2.7) ## log with base e, sometimes written as ln## [1] 0.9932518
exp(1) ## e to power of 1## [1] 2.718282
sqrt(9) ## squareroot of 9## [1] 3
factorial(3) ## 3!## [1] 6
abs(-5) ## absolute value## [1] 5
sum(2,4,6) ## summing up all these numbers## [1] 12
floor(5.7) ## round down to nearest integer## [1] 5
ceiling(5.7) ## round down to nearest integer## [1] 6
round(5.7) ## round to nearest integer## [1] 6
round(5.727,2) ##round to 2 decimal places## [1] 5.73
